title: crepis neglecta
intro: Crepis neglecta, also known as Hawk's Beard or Yellow Hawk's Beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Crepis neglecta has been used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Crepis neglecta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
